title: Paradisanthus paulensis

This family is a part of the order Gentianales, which also includes the families Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. Paradisanthus paulensis is further categorized within the genus Paradisanthus, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The classification of Paradisanthus paulensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids. This plant's classification is an example of how taxonomy helps organize and understand the diversity of plant life.

intro:
